title: Trydeas: Stone Tools
description: Each type of Stone deserves its own Tools!
body:
#
![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8f3912d547e64660d08ca674cfb7faa20b491ee.png)
![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555cbd58040379ad8b34d8b33ef4ce2b2d06e25e.png) #
⚠️ REQUIRES ARCHITECTURY API ⚠️

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555cbd58040379ad8b34d8b33ef4ce2b2d06e25e.png) #
![Info:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1731fe364c1effd07f250ffa5290398df322ad7b.png)


Trydeas: Stone Tools It's a mod that adds more sets of tools made from vanilla stones, adding an aesthetic touch when using different stones to make your tools. Just like stones, not all are the same, as their attributes are based on the type of stone they were created from, so they are not just different textures!

All current Tool Sets: - Deepslate  - Cobblestone - Andesite   - Diorite  - Granite  - Tuff  - Mossy Cobblestone  - Dripstone - Sandstone [NEW!] - Blackstone  - End Stone
![Some tools showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1fe2c452d8c32f8a3ab3f68b9c39636a17801e0.png)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555cbd58040379ad8b34d8b33ef4ce2b2d06e25e.png)

#
![Plans:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55aea936b5d28af06715da9247e28ea4427a1ede.png)

- Adds more Stone Tools (For example: Obsidian, Basalt, Calcite and more). - Translations. - Improve textures. - Port to requested versions and mod loaders (1.21.1 and above). - And more! (idk really xd)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555cbd58040379ad8b34d8b33ef4ce2b2d06e25e.png)
